summary: Successfully tested Service Date field functionality in Job Cards. All features working correctly: 1) Service Date field exists in New Job Card form with today's date as default, 2) Service Date column visible in Job Cards table, 3) Service Date editable in Edit Job Card modal. Fixed a backend bug where service_date was not being saved when creating new job cards.

fixed.issue: ServiceCreate model was missing service_date field, causing new job cards to always use current date instead of provided date
fixed.fix: Added service_date field to ServiceCreate model (line 303) and updated create_service endpoint to properly handle the provided date

critical_code_review_comments: Service Date field correctly added to New Job Card form in Service Details section
Service Date column correctly positioned after Service No. in Job Cards table
Service Date displays in 'en-IN' locale format (dd/mm/yyyy) in the table
Edit Job Card modal correctly shows and allows editing of Service Date
Backend now properly saves service_date when creating new job cards
CSV export includes Service Date column
seed_data_creation: Created test job cards during testing (prefixed with TEST-SRVDATE-) which were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Date field is fully functional in Job Cards. The field: 1) Appears in New Job Card form with today's date as default, 2) Shows in Job Cards table after Service No. column, 3) Is editable in Edit Job Card modal. Backend was fixed to properly save service_date when creating new services.
